column1: Higashiyama Craft Collective - shared kiln booking
Gas reduction kiln and the seasonal anagama. Four potters share. Book the gas slot a week ahead, the anagama is planned months out.
Mika Tanabe keeps this sheet. Do not double book. A firing slot is the loading day plus the cool, so the kiln is yours for three days around a gas firing.

column7: Seasonal Table, 6 pieces still short after this
Spring set. Asked for this slot for the autumn noodle bowls too
Three day load, light Fri 15. Whole collective helps stoke
78 hour firing. Paris pieces and museum vessels ride on this one

column1: Rule: the anagama firing is shared labour. If you load work you take a stoke shift. Margaret and Mika split the night shifts.
Next gas slot open after 17 Apr is the first week of June. Margaret to confirm a June slot for any Paris refires if the May wood firing is short.
